name: cadence
description: Deterministic scanner and reporter for Cadence repos

scripts.bundle:
esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=cadence-plugin/bin/cadence --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node
import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" && chmod +x cadence-plugin/bin/cadence
